catalog_content:
Item Name: Kibo Lentil Chips Variety Pack - Gluten-Free, Vegan, Non-GMO, Plant-Based, Maui Onion, Sea Salt, Spicy Ranch - Made with Real Veggies - 28g, 18 Pack
Bullet Point 1: NUTRITIOUS CHIPS VARIETY PACK IN THREE FUN FLAVORS: Add the new Kibo Lentil Chips to your go-to snack list and get treated to amazing flavors. Get all the flavors of vegan lentils in Sea Salt, Spicy Ranch, and Maui Onion seasonings.
Bullet Point 2: SATISFY YOUR CRUNCH CRAVING: Get all of the crunches you need with 40% less fat than potato chips and a new, fun oval shape. Our lentil chips are always baked, never fried.
Bullet Point 3: EXPAND THE PROTEIN SNACK PARTY: Lentil chips are rich in protein and low in carbohydrates, fats, and calories. Include this snack pack of good-for-you, high-protein snacks in your healthy, on-the-go lifestyle.
Bullet Point 4: GUILT-FREE SNACKING: Kibo Lentil Chips Variety Pack checks all the boxes for a healthy, allergy-free snack. All bags contain vegan, gluten-free snacks that are Non-GMO Project Verified.
Bullet Point 5: PLANT-BASED FOOD POWERHOUSE: Kibo is committed to keeping it real and sustainable! We use only plant-based proteins in our lentil chips, with no preservatives added.
Product Description: Enjoy all three flavors of nutritious, crispy, crunchy, plant-based goodness. From Maui Onion to Sea Salt to Spicy Ranch, each of our legume-based snacks is Gluten Free, Vegan, non-GMO, Kosher, Dairy Free. Loaded with fiber and protein rich, our lentil snacks are lighter in calories, carbs, and fat than the average chip. Did we mention they’re never fried? Get ready for a satisfying crunch, and be prepared to raise your expec-tatste-tions! Variety Pack Includes: Maui Onion + Sea Salt + Spicy Ranch
Value: 18.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: A mid-tier snack product positioned as a healthier alternative to traditional chips, with a focus on plant-based, high-protein, and gluten-free attributes. The variety pack format and bulk packaging suggest value pricing, while the emphasis on nutritional benefits justifies a premium over standard snack options. Certifications and allergen-friendly claims may appeal to health-conscious consumers.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Once Again Organic Crunchy Almond Butter, 16oz - Lightly Toasted - Salt Free, Unsweetened - USDA Organic, Gluten Free Certified, Peanut Free, Vegan, Kosher, Paleo - Glass Jar (2 Pack) Bullet Point 1: CRUNCHY ALMOND BUTTER || 16 oz deliciously crunchy, organic almond butter. Our almond butter is made with carefully selected, organically grown, unblanched almonds that are lightly toasted and milled until they are wonderfully creamy. We then add our crunchies. Produced in a peanut free facility. Manufactured in a facility that also processes soy, sesame seeds, and on equipment that processes other tree nuts Bullet Point 2: SALT FREE, UNSWEETENED || This product has just one ingredient - almonds! Bullet Point 3: ETHICALLY SOURCED || Our almonds are ethically sourced from Italy, Spain and California Bullet Point 4: CERTIFIED || USDA Organic, Gluten free Certified, Peanut Free, Vegan, Kosher, Paleo, Keto. No added preservatives Bullet Point 5: MINIMAL WASTE || Once Again Nut Butters are packaged in recyclable glass jars Product Description: Organic, Crunchy Almond Butter - Salt Free, Unsweetened - Pack of two 16 oz / 1lb Jars

Our almond butter is made with carefully selected, organically grown almonds that are lightly toasted and milled until they are wonderfully creamy. We then add our crunchies. Unsalted and unsweetened.

Our almonds are ethically sourced from Italy, Spain and California. Produced in a peanut free facility. USDA Certified Organic, Honest in Trade, Gluten-Free Certified, Keto, Vegan, Kosher Certified, and Non-GMO Verified. No preservatives added.

16oz / (1lb) glass jars - Pack of 2

While refrigeration of this product isn't necessary, if stirring is something you wish to minimize, stir and then refrigerate. Please be aware that if left out at room temperature, natural oil separation will occur.
Shelf life: 12 months from the date of production. Once opened, we recommend a three month shelf life. We cannot guarantee product performance past the sell-by date as we do not add preservatives to our products.

Ingredients: Organic almonds

Manufactured in a facility that also processes soy, sesame seeds, and on equipment that processes other tree nuts. Value: 32.0 Unit: Ounce

Packaged in recyclable glass jars, positioned as a premium, health-conscious product. The 2-pack bundle offers value for bulk buyers. Ethically sourced almonds from Italy, Spain, and California. catalog_content:
Item Name: Wicked Cutz Cracked Pepper Beef Jerky Chips, 28g Protein per Bag, Crispy & Crunchy Beef Jerky Crisps, USA Made Pepper Flavored Chips, High Protein Carnivore Snacks (2 Bags)
Bullet Point 1: PREMIUM PROTEIN CHIPS with 28g of protein per bag. With only 140 calories & 1g of carbohydrates, beef jerky chips provide long lasting energy throughout your busy day, unlike high sugar protein bars or so called healthy snacks that cause spikes & crashes.
Bullet Point 2: BOLD CRACKED PEPPER CHIPS are infused with freshly ground black pepper for a punch of flavor that satisfies cravings without the junk of traditional potato chips or processed snacks. Savory beef jerkey is delicious, crunchy, and perfect for when hunger strikes, on-the-go nutrition, hiking, camping, or office snacks.
Bullet Point 3: MADE IN THE USA high quality beef jerky and carnivore crisps contain no MSG, nitrates, gluten, or artificial junk. These meat snack chips the perfect keto friendly, low carb, sugar free alternative to traditional chips, crackers, and carb-heavy protein bars.
Bullet Point 4: CRISPY & CRUNCHY texture in every bite. Unlike traditional beef jerky sticks, these protein-packed healthy chips deliver a satisfying crunch that makes them the perfect protein snacks for adults. Great for keto diets & gluten free eating.
Bullet Point 5: LOW CARB SNACKS made with grass-fed beef to fuel your muscles and support recovery with every crunchy bite. Explore every beef jerky crisps flavor we have: Cracked Pepper, Korean BBQ, and Roasted Red Pepper Chips, or just grab a variety pack because you will not want to share your own bag.
Product Description: Revolutionize your snacking experience with Wicked Cutz Cracked Pepper Beef Jerky Chips. The perfect fusion of bold flavor and superior nutrition designed for those who refuse to compromise. Crafted from grass-fed beef and infused with freshly ground black pepper, these protein-packed chips deliver an impressive 28g of complete protein with just 1g of carbs per serving, making them the ideal choice for keto, paleo, and low-carb lifestyles. Unlike traditional jerky, our innovative thin-sliced chips provide a satisfying crunch that rivals potato chips while fueling your body with clean, sustained energy. Perfect for workout recovery, protein boosts, or conquering afternoon cravings without derailing your nutrition goals. No artificial preservatives, MSG, nitrates, or hidden sugars – just pure, high-quality protein. Whether you're an athlete maximizing performance, a fitness enthusiast tracking macros, or simply seeking healthier snack alternatives, these shelf stable, travel friendly jerky chips provide convenient nutrition that doesn't require refrigeration. Experience the perfect balance of savory flavor, nutritional excellence, and satisfying crunch that makes healthy eating effortless. Wicked Cutz is rooted in healthy lifestyles and time-honored family recipes. Once you open a bag and take the first bite, we guarantee you will love the wickedly awesome flavor of Wicked Cutz.
Value: 2.5
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium protein snack positioned as a high-end, keto-friendly alternative to traditional chips. Bold flavor claims and high protein content justify a premium price point. Bundled packaging and grass-fed beef sourcing indicate quality focus. Targeted at health-conscious consumers and fitness enthusiasts.
